ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_AUTO_PLAY.descr: When drawn, automatically play this card for free.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_AUTO_PLAY.title: Haste
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_KWSEACREATURE.d:
On entry, lose 5 HP.
Attacks apply 2 [blue]Neural Damage[/blue].
Take 25% more damage and deal 50% more damage.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_KWHUMAN.title: Human
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_KWHUMAN.descrip:
On entry, gain 2 Energy and 1 [blue]Stealth[/blue].
Draw 3 cards and [green]heal[/green] 6 HP.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_ECHO1.title: Echo
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_ECHO1.descripti: While this card is in your hand, playing other cards reduces the countdown shown on this card. When it reaches 0, the listed value increases by 1, then the countdown resets.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_ECHO2.title: Echo
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_ECHO2.descripti: While this card is in your hand, playing other cards reduces the countdown shown on this card. When it reaches 0, the listed value increases by 1, then the countdown resets.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_ECHO3.title: Echo
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_ECHO3.descripti: While this card is in your hand, playing other cards reduces the countdown shown on this card. When it reaches 0, the listed value increases by 1, then the countdown resets.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_SPUTTER.title: Splash
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_SPUTTER.descrip: Deal 50% damage to enemies other than the attack target.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_MONSTER1.title: Float
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_MONSTER1.descri: Summon a Floating Sea Drifter. If it already exists, give it that many [blue]Seabornization[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_MONSTER2.title: Harvest
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_MONSTER2.descri: Summon a Bowl-Sea Reaper. If it already exists, give it that many [blue]Seabornization[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_MONSTER3.title: Crawl
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_MONSTER3.descri: Summon a Sac-Sea Crawler. If it already exists, give it that many [blue]Seabornization[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_MONSTER.title: Summon
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_MONSTET.descrip: Summoned minions gain one active action each turn.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_TANDI.title: Bottom Dredge
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_TANDI.descripti: Look at a number of cards from the bottom of your draw pile, choose 1 to add to your hand, and put the rest into your discard pile.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_ALLME.title: Echo: Collective Self
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_ALLME.descripti: Every time you play 5 cards, damage 10 to all enemies. Every time you play 10 cards, gain 1 Energy.
